name: video_search
description: Search for social videos across YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and Twitter/X. Use this to find videos matching a specific topic, keyword, or trend.

platform.description: Platform to search: youtube, tiktok, instagram, twitter, or all

limit.description: Maximum number of videos to return

name: video_deterministic
description: Run deterministic video sourcing via /video_sourcing command. Use this when user explicitly invokes /video_sourcing with a query. Returns structured results with top 3 video references.

event_detail.description: Output detail level: compact (short) or verbose (full)

name: video_trending
description: Get trending or popular videos from YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and Twitter/X. Use this to discover what's currently trending across social video platforms.

limit.description: Maximum number of videos to return

name: video_compare
description: Compare and analyze videos across YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and Twitter/X. Use this to get a cross-platform analysis of videos on a specific topic, comparing metrics, engagement, and content patterns.

query.description: Topic to compare videos across platforms

limit_per_platform.description: Number of videos per platform to compare
